negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_5f567f79-4dd0-413d-a81a-2607684decf2
prompt: The video begins with a view from inside a vehicle, likely captured by a dashboard camera, showing a city street scene. A large public transit bus labeled "Clean Air Vehicle" is prominently visible on the left side of the frame, traveling in the adjacent left lane, moving away from the camera. The bus has a red stripe along its side. The street is lined with modern buildings, including a tall, glass-fronted structure on the right and a brick building with numerous windows on the left. Orange construction barriers partially visible on the right side of the road, are placed along the right sidewalk, indicating ongoing work. The road features a crosswalk with white stripes, and a black car is seen moving ahead of what appears to be a traffic light. The ego vehicle drives straight under the green traffic lights. The sky is partly cloudy, suggesting a bright day with scattered sunlight. As the video progresses, the bus continues to move along the same road it was traveling from the beginning. Its rear lights are illuminated, indicating it is in motion. The black car ahead also moves forward without coming to a stop at the traffic light. The surrounding urban landscape, including the modern buildings and construction barriers, remains static throughout the sequence. By the final frame, the bus has moved further down the road, and the black car is also seen moving straight, with the urban backdrop of modern buildings and construction barriers remaining consistent.  A medium shot from a slightly elevated perspective, capturing the movement of the bus and the black car as they navigate through the intersection.
